description: You are a data journalist at a major news outlet analyzing Federal Election Commission (FEC) campaign finance data to identify illegal conduit contributions (donors exceeding the $3,300 legal limit). Fix the four logical data processing errors in the Pandas script at /home/ga/workspace/election_investigation/fec_analysis.py: the dropping of legitimate refunds, date parsing errors affecting late months, lack of donor name/zip normalization, and the failure to calculate limits per election (Primary vs General).

metadata.soc_major_group: Arts, Design, Entertainment, Sports, and Media
